vol_description:
Data collected as part of the INFORMS MKT research grant.

Data include: 
1. Video recordings of secondary teachers instruction of exponential functions (3-5 lessons per teacher) along with pre and post interviews for each cycle of instruction.
2. Video recordings of initial and final interview with each teacher before and after the collection of recorded lessons 
3. Video recordings of a completion interview during which we asked teachers questions related to their Mathematical Knowledge for Teaching (MKT).
4. Files containing relevant information to the data collected (e.g. lesson plans, worksheets, tasks, teacher work, and some student work)
5. (optional) A pre and post student assessment
6. (optional) Student work the teacher shared
